info.title: LxMonika Framework and SDK
info.description: Framework for building and managing Windows Pico process providers.

commands.name: exec
commands.description: Execute a Pico process using a lxmonika provider.

options.name: --provider
options.description: The name of the provider as registered by the driver. If not specified, the command will use the first available provider.

options.name: --provider-args
options.description: The arguments to be passed to the provider.

options.name: --root
options.description: The file or directory to be used as the root for the new process. If not specified, the command will use the current working directory.

options.name: --cd
options.description:
The current directory for the new process.
--               Pass the remaining command line as-is to the new process.

arguments.name: ARGUMENTS
arguments.description: The command to be executed by the provider.

options.name: --core
options.description: A path to 'lxcore.sys'. If not specified, the command will search the executable file's location.

options.name: --borrow
options.description: The name of a core service for lxmonika to borrow. If not specified, the command will search a known list of core services.

options.name: --enable-late-registration
options.description: Enable lxmonika late registration using legacy heuristics.

options.name: --force
options.description: Bypass system checks while installing lxmonika.

arguments.name: DRIVERPATH
arguments.description: A path to lxmonika. If not specified, the command will look for 'lxmonika.sys' at the executable file's location.

commands.name: provider
commands.description: Install a lxmonika-based Pico process provider.

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the provider service. If not specified, the command will use the driver file name without extension.

options.name: --display-name
options.description: The optional display name of the provider service.

arguments.name: DRIVERPATH
arguments.description: A path to the provider to be installed.

commands.name: uninstall
commands.description:
Uninstall lxmonika or a provider.
Run 'monika [command] --help' for more information on a command.

commands.name: provider
commands.description: Uninstall a lxmonika-based Pico process provider.

arguments.name: SERVICENAME
arguments.description: The name of the provider service to be uninstalled. Must match the one registered during installation.
